quality_highlights: tokens.md: exemplary reference document — Quick Reference table, ASCII precedence diagrams, consistent property tables, caution/note admonitions, dedicated 'no-fallback' section. Sets the bar for reference docs.
call_workflow_validation.go: not-found error is comprehensive (shows all 3 checked paths + 3-step fix list). Duplicates, self-reference, and empty-list errors are all clear and actionable.

single_file_improvements.issue: Line 173: typo 'Security Architectur' (missing 'e') in anchor text of security FAQ answer. Change to 'Security Architecture'.
Lines 112, 144, 162: workflow_call trigger error lacks 'To fix' example. Add frontmatter snippet showing how to declare workflow_call in on: section, matching style of other errors in the file.
